LitigationOS

AI-powered litigation intelligence for pro se litigants. Score every action, analyze every document, win every case.

Launch Dashboard →View Pricing

Everything You Need to Win

⚖️

OMEGA Scoring

10-axis scoring system rates every legal action from 0-100. Know exactly what to file and when.

🔍

Evidence Analysis

AI-powered evidence mining. Cross-reference quotes, detect contradictions, build impeachment packages.

📊

Graph Intelligence

Neo4j-powered knowledge graph connects evidence → claims → laws → actions → outcomes.

📄

Filing Builder

WYSIWYG editor with MCR compliance checking. Generate court-ready documents in minutes.

⏱️

Timeline Tracker

Master chronology with separation day counter, deadline alerts, and docket monitoring.

💰

Pro Se Toolkit

Affordable tools designed for self-represented litigants. Level the playing field.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Start free. Upgrade when you need more power. 20% off annual plans.

Free

$0/mo
  • ✓ 1 case
  • ✓ Basic timeline
  • ✓ 500MB storage
  • ✓ Community support

Lite

$29/mo
  • ✓ 1 case
  • ✓ OMEGA scoring
  • ✓ Evidence analysis
  • ✓ 5GB storage
  • ✓ Email support
Most Popular

Pro

$99/mo
  • ✓ 5 cases
  • ✓ Full AI analysis
  • ✓ Graph visualization
  • ✓ Filing builder
  • ✓ 25GB storage
  • ✓ Priority support

Enterprise

$299/mo
  • ✓ Unlimited cases
  • ✓ White-label
  • ✓ API access
  • ✓ Custom integrations
  • ✓ 100GB storage
  • ✓ Dedicated support
